overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting ancient Egypt, showing a female character walking along elevated stone terraces with balustrades, overlooking a sprawling cityscape with palm trees and mountains in the distance. The character moves from a narrow terrace past an orange and white building toward an open area with a lily pond and a vine-covered pergola.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace walkway alongside historic building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated terrace pathway beside the orange and white building

entered.detail: two-story building with orange lower walls and white upper walls with small windows
light-colored stone tiles with weathered patches and drainage channels
ornate carved stone balustrade with geometric patterns overlooking the city
massive rectangular stone block with metal bands sitting on a stone platform
sprawling ancient city with flat-roofed buildings extending to the mountains
tall palm trees visible against the hillside in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow elevated stone terrace beside an orange and white building, passing large stone blocks and ornate balustrades. The ancient city sprawls in the distance under a bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop terrace with city overlook

events.description: exits the narrow terrace beside the building into a more open rooftop area with expansive city views

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open terrace with expansive views of the ancient city and distant mountains

entered.detail: scattered pile of stone blocks and debris along the terrace edge

segments.scene_description: Moving past the building, the terrace opens up to reveal sweeping views of the sprawling city and mountains beyond. Stone rubble lies scattered along the pathway as the character continues walking along the balustrade.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace garden with water feature and pergola

events.description: terrace walkway crosses over a lily pond water feature visible below through gaps in the flooring

agents.ego_description: approaching a vine-covered stone pergola while crossing over the lily pond water feature

entered.detail: water filled with green lily pads visible below the terrace through gaps in the stone flooring
stone columned structure with a flat roof ahead on the terrace
green trailing vines draping from the pergola structure
small wooden stand with a bowl containing fruit or offerings

segments.scene_description: The path continues over a section where a lily pond is visible below through gaps in the terrace floor, approaching a stone pergola draped with hanging vines. A small wooden table with offerings sits to the right as the character moves toward the shaded structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated stone terrace that transitions from a narrow architectural corridor into an open, garden-like sanctuary. It begins with the character walking beside an orange and white building, passing large stone blocks and ornate balustrades under a bright midday sun. As the character moves past the building, the terrace opens up to reveal sweeping views of a sprawling ancient city and distant mountains, with scattered stone rubble lining the pathway. The scene then shifts as the path continues over gaps in the floor that reveal a lily pond below, before turning toward a stone pergola draped in hanging vines. Finally, the camera glides past a small wooden table of offerings and into the shade of the vine-covered structure.
